creator: niceshorts@yahoo.com
text:
Please view replacement shar for your consideration.

o Added spamd.README, sample-nonspam.txt, sample-spam.txt to
  DOCSDIR
o Retain default cf and prefs file in standard location.


# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	p5-Mail-SpamAssassin/
#	p5-Mail-SpamAssassin/Makefile
#	p5-Mail-SpamAssassin/distinfo
#	p5-Mail-SpamAssassin/pkg-comment
#	p5-Mail-SpamAssassin/pkg-descr
#	p5-Mail-SpamAssassin/pkg-plist
#
echo c - p5-Mail-SpamAssassin/
mkdir -p p5-Mail-SpamAssassin/ > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - p5-Mail-SpamAssassin/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >p5-Mail-SpamAssassin/Makefile << 'END-of-p5-Mail-SpamAssassin/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	p5-Mail-SpamAssassin
X# Date created:				Nov 26 2001
X# Whom:					Anthony Kim
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	Mail-SpamAssassin
XPORTVERSION=	1.3
XCATEGORIES=	mail perl5
XMASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_PERL_CPAN}
XMASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	Mail
XPKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
X
XMAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.ORG
X
XBUILD_DEPENDS=	${PREFIX}/lib/perl5/site_perl/${PERL_VER}/Net/DNS.pm:${PORTSDIR}/net/p5-Net-DNS \
X		${PREFIX}/lib/perl5/site_perl/${PERL_VER}/Mail/Audit.pm:${PORTSDIR}/mail/p5-Mail-Audit
X
XPERL_CONFIGURE=	yes
XMAN3PREFIX=	${PREFIX}/lib/perl5/${PERL_VERSION}
XMAN3=		Mail::SpamAssassin.3 Mail::SpamAssassin::PerMsgStatus.3
XMAN1PREFIX=	${PREFIX}
XMAN1=		spamd.1 spamassassin.1 spamc.1
X
Xpost-install:
X	${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
X	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/README ${DOCSDIR}
X	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/sample-nonspam.txt ${DOCSDIR}
X	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/sample-spam.txt ${DOCSDIR}
X	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/spamassassin.cf ${DOCSDIR}
X	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/spamassassin.prefs ${DOCSDIR}
X	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/spamd/README ${DOCSDIR}/spamd.README
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-p5-Mail-SpamAssassin/Makefile
echo x - p5-Mail-SpamAssassin/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >p5-Mail-SpamAssassin/distinfo << 'END-of-p5-Mail-SpamAssassin/distinfo'
XMD5 (Mail-SpamAssassin-1.3.tar.gz) = 2ccadd49e78b38393f6ba5e0171bb7e0
END-of-p5-Mail-SpamAssassin/distinfo
echo x - p5-Mail-SpamAssassin/pkg-comment
sed 's/^X//' >p5-Mail-SpamAssassin/pkg-comment << 'END-of-p5-Mail-SpamAssassin/pkg-comment'
XSpamAssassin Perl module mail filter
END-of-p5-Mail-SpamAssassin/pkg-comment
echo x - p5-Mail-SpamAssassin/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >p5-Mail-SpamAssassin/pkg-descr << 'END-of-p5-Mail-SpamAssassin/pkg-descr'
XSpamAssassin is a mail filter which attempts to identify spam using text
Xanalysis and several internet-based realtime blacklists.
X
XUsing its rule base, it uses a wide range of heuristic tests on mail
Xheaders and body text to identify "spam", also known as unsolicited
Xcommercial email.
X
XOnce identified, the mail can then be optionally tagged as spam for later
Xfiltering using the user's own mail user-agent application.
X
XWWW:	http://spamassassin.taint.org/released/
END-of-p5-Mail-SpamAssassin/pkg-descr
echo x - p5-Mail-SpamAssassin/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >p5-Mail-SpamAssassin/pkg-plist << 'END-of-p5-Mail-SpamAssassin/pkg-plist'
Xbin/spamc
Xbin/spamd
Xbin/spamassassin
Xlib/perl5/site_perl/%%PERL_VER%%/Mail/SpamAssassin.pm
Xlib/perl5/site_perl/%%PERL_VER%%/Mail/SpamAssassin/Conf.pm
Xlib/perl5/site_perl/%%PERL_VER%%/Mail/SpamAssassin/Dns.pm
Xlib/perl5/site_perl/%%PERL_VER%%/Mail/SpamAssassin/EncappedMessage.pm
Xlib/perl5/site_perl/%%PERL_VER%%/Mail/SpamAssassin/EvalTests.pm
Xlib/perl5/site_perl/%%PERL_VER%%/Mail/SpamAssassin/ExposedMessage.pm
Xlib/perl5/site_perl/%%PERL_VER%%/Mail/SpamAssassin/Message.pm
Xlib/perl5/site_perl/%%PERL_VER%%/Mail/SpamAssassin/PerMsgStatus.pm
Xlib/perl5/site_perl/%%PERL_VER%%/Mail/SpamAssassin/Replier.pm
Xlib/perl5/site_perl/%%PERL_VER%%/Mail/SpamAssassin/Reporter.pm
Xlib/perl5/site_perl/%%PERL_VER%%/spamassassin.cf
Xlib/perl5/site_perl/%%PERL_VER%%/spamassassin.prefs
Xlib/perl5/site_perl/%%PERL_VER%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Mail/SpamAssassin/.packlist
X%%PORTDOCS%%/share/doc/Mail-SpamAssassin/README
X%%PORTDOCS%%/share/doc/Mail-SpamAssassin/spamd.README
X%%PORTDOCS%%/share/doc/Mail-SpamAssassin/sample-nonspam.txt
X%%PORTDOCS%%/share/doc/Mail-SpamAssassin/sample-spam.txt
X%%PORTDOCS%%/share/doc/Mail-SpamAssassin/spamassassin.cf
X%%PORTDOCS%%/share/doc/Mail-SpamAssassin/spamassassin.prefs
X@dirrm lib/perl5/site_perl/%%PERL_VER%%/Mail/SpamAssassin
X@dirrm lib/perl5/site_perl/%%PERL_VER%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Mail/SpamAssassin
X@unexec rmdir %D/lib/perl5/site_perl/%%PERL_VER%%/Mail 2>/dev/null || true
END-of-p5-Mail-SpamAssassin/pkg-plist
exit
